mapper.select: SELECT v.`id`, v.`place_id`, v.`title`, v.`sub_title`, v.`rules`, v.`pay_value`, v.`actual_value`, v.`type`, sv.`stock` AS stock, sv.`begin_time` AS beginTime, sv.`end_time` AS endTime FROM tb_experience_pass v LEFT JOIN tb_flash_pass sv ON v.id = sv.pass_id WHERE v.place_id = #{placeId} AND v.status = 1
